title: felicia bellidioides subsp. bellidioides
intro: Felicia bellidioides subsp. bellidioides is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and lance-shaped leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Felicia bellidioides subsp. bellidioides include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
